evals.prompt: How do I optimize my NestJS Docker image size?
evals.expected_output: Use multi-stage builds: build stage installs devDependencies and runs nest build; run stage copies only dist/ and pruned node_modules using node:alpine. Do not run as root (USER node).

evals.prompt: How do I set Node.js memory limits in a Kubernetes deployment?
evals.expected_output: Explicitly set --max-old-space-size to ~75-80% of K8s memory limit. Container limit is not the same as Node heap. Example: 1GB limit → 800MB old space.

evals.prompt: Where should I run TypeORM migrations in a Kubernetes deployment?
evals.expected_output: Use K8s Init Container, not main.ts startup. The init container runs migration:run before the app container starts. Never run migrations on every app startup.

should_not_trigger: How do I deploy a Spring Boot app to Docker?
How do I configure NestJS modules?
How do I write a Dockerfile for a Go app?
